---
title: "exercise"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-25"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Regression

VL 2 `02_01_Intro_Regression.pdf`

```{r}
y = 0:100
plot(y, dbinom(0:100, 100, 2/6), type = "h")
```

```{r}
y = 0:100
Like = dbinom(y = 34, prob = c(0:6)/6, size = 100)
plot(0:6, Like, type='p')
```
